entries.title: Probability Basics
entries.content: P(event) = favorable outcomes / total outcomes (equally likely). Value between 0 and 1.

entries.title: Conditional Probability
entries.content: Probability of A given B already occurred: P(A|B) = P(A∩B) / P(B).

entries.title: Permutations
entries.content: Ordered arrangements. nPr = n! / (n−r)! — choosing r items from n in order.

entries.title: Expected Value
entries.content: Average outcome over many trials: E(X) = Σ x·P(x). Used in games, insurance, and decision theory.
